Session 1 	Session 2 	Session 3
M A R K C O M P L E T E
In this quick training, Dean is going to walk you through filling out the “Narrow Your Niche” Tool. While this is a quick and easy tool, this is something
you can print out, put on your whiteboard, put next to your laptop or simply take a picture of it and be reminded at all times who your ideal clients are,
what you can help them accomplish and how you help them accomplish it. This is a very simple yet powerful tool!
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
You should know your super power by this point.
You should have reversed engineered that power to get your ideal client.
You should know their biggest pain points and biggest desires.
Fill out the “Narrow Your Niche Tool”
Understand the framework of taking your students from “where they are ‐ to where they want to go”
